# truenas_share_smb (Data Source)

Provides information about an SMB share on TrueNAS SCALE.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "truenas_share_smb" "example" {
  id = 1
}

output "smb_name" {
  value = data.truenas_share_smb.example.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (Number) The numeric SMB share ID to look up.

### Read-Only

- `access_based_share_enumeration` (Boolean) Whether ABE (access-based share enumeration) is enabled.
- `browsable` (Boolean) Whether the share appears in network browsing.
- `comment` (String) Free-form comment.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the share is enabled.
- `name` (String) Share name (network-visible).
- `path` (String) Exported filesystem path.
- `purpose` (String) SMB share purpose preset.
- `read_only` (Boolean) Whether the share is read-only.
